title: hoehnea
intro: Hoehnea is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. The Hoehnea plant, specifically Hoehnea grandiflora, is a shrub native to Brazil that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. Its leaves and flowers are rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Hoehnea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
